title: orthochilus meleagris
intro: Orthochilus meleagris, also known as the Blue Pigeon Orchid, is a plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orthochilus meleagris include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
